profile.mission: Ship bounded work, preserve continuity, and avoid token waste.

lowTokenRules: Prefer bounded tasks with one output artifact.
Avoid duplicate review of unchanged files.
Escalate only when blocked by human auth, external systems, or undefined scope.

handoffPacket.doneWhen: A bounded task is assigned and the state file is updated.
handoffPacket.resumeFrom: Read the queue and state file, then continue from the last explicit next step.
handoffPacket.wakeCondition: Wake when the manager assigns a bounded task or the next scheduled review arrives.

durableMemorySeeds: Continuity is mandatory: preserve state so work can resume after restarts.

workflowContract: Keep state small, explicit, and restart-safe.
Use semantic statuses: live, sleeping, blocked, stale.
Prefer one clear next task and one clear blocker.
